zh.lifeSummary: 當John Marmion 4th Baron Marmion of Winteringham於1292年出生在英國林可爾史爾塔特沙拉爾時，他的父親Sir John Marmion 3rd Baron Marmion of Winteringham44歲，母親Isabel Peck29歲。他於1309年之前與Maud Furnival結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1335年4月30日在英國越可爾約克享年43歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾韋斯特 坦費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Marmion 4th Baron Marmion of Winteringham于1292年出生在英国林可爾史爾塔特沙拉爾时，他的父亲Sir John Marmion 3rd Baron Marmion of Winteringham44岁，母亲Isabel Peck29岁。他于1309年之前与Maud Furnival结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1335年4月30日在英国越可爾約克享年43岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾韋斯特 坦費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Marmion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: perhaps an Anglicized form of an unidentified Gaelic name. Compare   Merriman  .
English (Lancashire; of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Old French marmion ‘monkey, brat’.

variants.name: Merriman
meanings: nickname from Middle English mirie, merie, murie ‘merry, pleasant’ + man ‘man’. Compare Merry 1. This surname is established in Ireland (perhaps as an Anglicized form of an unidentified Gaelic name; compare Marmion ) as well as England.

there has probably been some confusion with Marriman, probably an occupational name meaning ‘servant of Mary’, from the female personal name Mary (see Marie ) + Middle English man in the sense ‘servant’, or perhaps a pet form of Mary using the hypocoristic suffix -man. The surname Marriman is now vanishingly rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Marmon
meanings: variant of Marriman, an occupational name meaning ‘servant of Mary’, from the female personal name Mary (see Marie ) + Middle English man in the sense ‘servant’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When John Marmion 4th Baron Marmion of Winteringham was born in 1292, in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Sir John Marmion 3rd Baron Marmion of Winteringham, was 44 and his mother, Isabel Peck, was 29. He married Maud Furnival before 1309. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 30 April 1335, in York, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 43, and was buried in West Tanfield, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.West Tanfield, Yorkshire, England: West Tanfield, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Marmion 4th Baron Marmion of Winteringham est né en 1292, à Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Marmion 3rd Baron Marmion of Winteringham, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Isabel Peck, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Maud Furnival avant 1309. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 30 avril 1335, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à West Tanfield, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.West Tanfield, Yorkshire, England: West Tanfield, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John Marmion 4th Baron Marmion of Winteringham 1292 in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Marmion 3rd Baron Marmion of Winteringham 44 und seine Mutter Isabel Peck 29. Er hat vor 1309 Maud Furnival geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 30. April 1335 im Alter von 43 Jahren in York, Yorkshire, England und wurde in West Tanfield, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Marmion 4th Baron Marmion of Winteringham è nato il nel 1292 nel Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Marmion 3rd Baron Marmion of Winteringham, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Peck, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Maud Furnival prima del 1309. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 30 aprile 1335, nel York, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolto a West Tanfield, North Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Marmion 4th Baron Marmion of Winteringhamが1292年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアタッテルシャルで生まれた時，父Sir John Marmion 3rd Baron Marmion of Winteringhamは44歳，母Isabel Peckは29歳であった。1309年以前にMaud Furnivalと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1335年4月30日にイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークで43歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアウエスト タンフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.West Tanfield, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 웨스트 탠필드
ko.lifeSummary: John Marmion 4th Baron Marmion of Winteringham(이)가 1292년 영국 링코실르 타터샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Marmion 3rd Baron Marmion of Winteringham(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Peck(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1309년 이전 Maud Furnival(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1335년 4월 30일 영국 요르크실르 요르크에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 웨스트 탠필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Marmion 4th Baron Marmion of Winteringham nasceu em 1292, em Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Marmion 3rd Baron Marmion of Winteringham, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Peck, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud Furnival antes 1309. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 30 de abril de 1335, em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 43 anos, e foi sepultado em West Tanfield, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.West Tanfield, Yorkshire, England: вест танфиелд, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Marmion 4th Baron Marmion of Winteringham родился в 1292 г. в местности таттиршолл, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Marmion 3rd Baron Marmion of Winteringham было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Peck, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Furnival перед 1309 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 30 апреля 1335 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности вест танфиелд, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
